francophone.excerpt: Conformément aux réquisitions du parquet de Paris, il a été placé en détention provisoire à la prison de la Santé à Paris.

francophone.excerpt: Ecrivain et cinéaste, le militant écologiste rend hommage au sociologue et philosophe, mort samedi à 104 ans.

anglophone.title: Oscar-winning Star Wars editor Marcia Lucas dies aged 80
anglophone.excerpt: The film editor and ex-wife of director George Lucas was widely recognised as a pivotal creative force behind the original space trilogy.

anglophone.title: Trump attacks artists dropping out of US Freedom 250 concert and mulls appearing himself
anglophone.excerpt: Performers Young MC, Poison frontman Bret Michaels and country singer Martina McBride raised concerns the event will be political.

anglophone.title: 'No-one feels safe now': Residents of Romanian city hit by drone share fears
anglophone.excerpt: People have just begun returning to check on their homes in the block that was hit early on Friday morning.

anglophone.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
anglophone.excerpt: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.

anglophone.title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
anglophone.excerpt: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.

anglophone.title: Pride celebrations struggle as corporate sponsorships dry up
anglophone.excerpt: Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.

anglophone.title: Carcass of Timmy the humpback whale brought to shore in Denmark
anglophone.excerpt: The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks.

anglophone.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
anglophone.excerpt: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

anglophone.title: Opinion: Pope Leo reminds us of the value of our shared humanity
anglophone.excerpt: Pope Leo's first encyclical voices his concerns about technology and AI. The pope cautions about the illusions AI bots can create, and how important actual human relationships are.

anglophone.title: Hegseth urges Asian leaders to boost military spending against China
anglophone.excerpt: The U.S. defense secretary said there is "rightful alarm" of China's military build up. But he also struck a more moderate tone on U.S.-China relations – and notably sidestepped bringing up Taiwan.

anglophone.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
anglophone.excerpt: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

anglophone.title: Bound by blood: new film highlights Jamaica’s outlawed obeah belief system

anglophone.title: Colombia's untapped wonder: The Mavecure Mountains
anglophone.excerpt: Far from Colombia's tourist hubs, the Mavecure Mountains rise from the Amazon jungle. Once off-limits during conflict, they now draw adventurous visitors to rare wildlife, sacred sites and vast views.

anglophone.title: The NTSB tries to keep cockpit audio recordings private. AI is making that harder
anglophone.excerpt: The National Transportation Safety Board temporarily pulled its docket system offline after digital images were used to reconstruct cockpit voice recordings of the pilots in a recent crash.

anglophone.title: Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave after 10 days
anglophone.excerpt: Two of the seven villagers who entered the narrow tunnels in search for gold on 20 May are still missing.

anglophone.title: Myanmar's Min Aung Hlaing takes first foreign tour as leader, with visit to India
anglophone.excerpt: The tour comes as Myanmar's new government tries to consolidate its political position regionally, while continuing to wage a brutal civil war.

anglophone.title: How single-party primary elections are reshaping Congress
anglophone.excerpt: Some lawmakers are speaking out against closed, single-party primaries, which they see as part of a system that limits voter choice and incentivizes elected officials to prioritize party loyalty.

anglophone.title: What it means to be a man is a theme in Texas Senate race as Paxton attacks Talarico
anglophone.excerpt: Soon after winning the Texas Republican Senate primary runoff, Ken Paxton attacked Democratic nominee, state Rep. James Talarico as "too low-T for Texas," putting manhood front and center in the race.

anglophone.title: Spain's Sánchez digs in after eight years as PM as wave of scandals threatens survival

anglophone.title: Ghana's parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
